summary.title: Show release note history in Settings
changes: Settings now has a "What's New" link that opens build release notes.
The release notes view shows a history of recent builds instead of a single build entry.
A red badge on the Settings link displays how many builds you haven't seen yet.
Opening the release notes can mark the newest builds as seen so they stop appearing as new.
If no release notes are available, a friendly message explains that none are present.
